name: ads-competitor
description: Competitor ad intelligence analysis across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, Microsoft, and Apple Ads. Analyzes competitor ad copy, creative strategy, keyword targeting, estimated spend via Meta Ad Library / Google Ads Transparency Center / TikTok Top Ads, and identifies competitive gaps and opportunities. Use when user says competitor ads, ad spy, competitive analysis, competitor PPC, ad intelligence, Meta Ad Library, Facebook Ad Library, Google Ads Transparency, competitor creative, or competito
author: AgriciDaniel
summary_zh: 这是一款跨主流平台的竞品广告情报分析工具，帮你摸清对手的广告套路和投放策略，发现竞争差距与机会，适合做竞品广告调研和优化自身投放策略。
